LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND APPLICATION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT, HAVING REVIEWED THE DOCUMENTS, GRANTED DEFENDANT HA TO HO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND APPLICATION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT WILL DEPOSIT DUE RENT AND WEEKLY RENT TO AN ACCOUNT TO BE WITHHELD UNTIL FINAL DISPOSITION. COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER AND SUBMIT TO THE COURT TODAY FOR SIGNATURE.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT HA TO HO's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND -- Granted. Conditioned upon payment by defendant of $750 in attorneys' fees, and contract rate of rent from date of judgment to present by 4/2, and once trial date is set, to date of trial, balance due by 4/9. Failure to pay amount required shall result in striking of answer and entry of default. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Judgment Entered

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Application For Relief From Forfeiture
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Advanced From Jan-06-03 To Dec-16-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Application For Relief From Forfeiture
Off Calendar Dec-16-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Frank A. D'Alfonsi, Esq., 759-7410, for defendant Ha To Ho, moving to set aside default and default judgment and for relief from fortfeiture
* Counsel submitted copies of moving and opposition papers.
** No other appearance. The Court, having reviewed the documents, granted DEFENDANT HA TO HO's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Application For Relief From Forfeiture on the condition that defendant will deposit due rent and weekly rent to an account to be withheld until final disposition. Counsel is to prepare an order and submit to the Court today for signature. (JJM/301/DR) Reporter: Eric Throne CSR # 7855
